name: @midnight-protocol/caller-contract-20-field
description: A 20-field signet requester used as the LOCKSTEP FIXTURE for chunked ledger parsing: past 15 fields compactc stores fields in a chunk tree, and the raw readers in @sig-net/midnight must resolve flat field numbers through it exactly like the generated ledger(). Simulator tests only: no deploy flow, no notifier, compile is skip-zk on purpose (no compile:zk script).
